pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh (line 7) and export_result.sh (line 8) - path is correct

Natural Earth ne_110m_admin_0_countries dataset contains NAME, ISO_A3, POP_EST, ECONOMY, CONTINENT fields. ogr2ogr converts field names to lowercase by default when importing to PostgreSQL per GDAL documentation.
Coordinates (47.0, 2.0) confirmed as France location via geographic coordinates lookup
Coordinates (47.0, 2.0) confirmed as France location via geographic coordinates lookup
Verified from setup_geoserver.sh: workspace 'ne' is created (line 137) and layer 'ne_countries' is published (line 185)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real geospatial data from Natural Earth's ne_110m_admin_0_countries dataset, which is publicly available via https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/. The dataset contains the five required country attributes: name, iso_a3 (ISO 3-letter country code), pop_est (population estimate), economy (economic classification), and continent. These attributes are stored as uppercase in the original shapefile but converted to lowercase by ogr2ogr during PostgreSQL import. The test coordinates (47.0°N, 2.0°E) correctly target France. The GeoServer layer is correctly identified as 'ne:ne_countries' in the 'ne' workspace, and the template file path is correctly specified at '/opt/geoserver/data_dir/workspaces/ne/postgis_ne/ne_countries/content.ftl'.
